Law: Ley Orgánica del Presupuesto
Base identifier: DECRETO-101-97
Fixture: engine/tests/fixtures/gt/sample-budget-law.pdf
Extracted text: tmp/extracted/gt/sample-budget-law.txt

Goal:
  Validate whether Guatemala can support Legalize-style historical commits:
  one law file, each reform as one git commit, with commit dates derived from
  reform publication/effective dates.

Evidence from extracted text:

Version 1:
  source_type: official_or_institutional_compilation
  source_fixture: sample-budget-law.pdf
  base_law: Decreto Número 101-97
  date_type: original_decree_date_or_publication_date
  date: TBD
  text_available: yes
  stable_identifier: DECRETO-101-97
  notes:
    The consolidated text is extractable with PyMuPDF.
    The text contains article headings such as ARTICULO 1.-, ARTICULO 2.-, etc.

Version 2:
  source_type: reform_note_inside_consolidated_text
  source_fixture: sample-budget-law.pdf
  reform_decree: Decreto Número 13-2013
  date_type: reform_note_date
  date: 2013-11-20
  affected_articles:
    - TBD
  replacement_text_available: partial
  stable_identifier: DECRETO-101-97
  evidence:
    Reform notes detected, including:
    "Reformado por el Artículo 1, del Decreto Número 13-2013 el 20-11-2013"
  notes:
    Need to obtain the official Decreto 13-2013 PDF and verify the exact affected articles
    and replacement text.

Version 3:
  source_type: reform_note_inside_consolidated_text
  source_fixture: sample-budget-law.pdf
  reform_decree: Decreto Número 9-2014
  date_type: reform_note_date
  date: 2014-03-03
  affected_articles:
    - TBD
  replacement_text_available: partial
  stable_identifier: DECRETO-101-97
  evidence:
    Reform note detected:
    "Reformado por el Artículo 1, del Decreto Número 9-2014 el 03-03-2014"
  notes:
    Need to obtain the official Decreto 9-2014 PDF and verify the exact affected article
    and replacement text.

Conclusion:
  historical_versions_available: partial
  strategy: reform-note extraction from consolidated text plus reform-decree reconstruction
  blocker:
    The fixture provides reform notes, but not full prior historical versions.
    To pass the Legalize version-history gate fully, the original law and at least one
    official reform decree must be obtained and compared.
  evidence_summary:
    Reform notes extracted from sample-budget-law.txt show:
      - Decreto Número 13-2013 appears 44 times.
      - Decreto Número 71-98 appears 6 times.
      - Decreto Número 9-2014 appears 3 times.
      - DECRETO NÚMERO 101-97 appears 1 time.
  next_action:
    Download official Decreto 13-2013 PDF.
    Extract text from Decreto 13-2013.
    Confirm it reforms Decreto 101-97.
    Identify affected articles and replacement text.
    Build a minimal two-version reconstruction for DECRETO-101-97.


Law: Ley Orgánica del Presupuesto
Base identifier: DECRETO-101-97
Base fixture: engine/tests/fixtures/gt/sample-budget-law.pdf
Reform fixture: engine/tests/fixtures/gt/reform-decree-13-2013.pdf
Base extracted text: tmp/extracted/gt/sample-budget-law.txt
Reform extracted text: tmp/extracted/gt/reform-decree-13-2013.txt

Goal:
  Validate whether Guatemala can support Legalize-style historical commits:
  one law file, each reform as one git commit, with commit dates derived from
  reform publication/effective dates.

Extraction evidence:
  Base law:
    pages: 37
    extracted_chars: 107926
    extraction_method: PyMuPDF page.get_text("text")
    text_available: yes

  Reform decree:
    reform_decree: Decreto Número 13-2013
    pages: 16
    extracted_chars: 126775
    extraction_method: PyMuPDF page.get_text("text")
    text_available: yes

Version 1:
  source_type: official_or_institutional_compilation
  source_fixture: sample-budget-law.pdf
  base_law: Decreto Número 101-97
  date_type: original_decree_date_or_publication_date
  date: TBD
  text_available: yes
  stable_identifier: DECRETO-101-97
  notes:
    The consolidated text is extractable with PyMuPDF.
    The text contains article headings such as ARTICULO 1.-, ARTICULO 2.-, etc.
    The text includes embedded reform notes referencing multiple reform decrees.

Version 2:
  source_type: official_reform_decree
  source_fixture: reform-decree-13-2013.pdf
  reform_decree: Decreto Número 13-2013
  date_type: reform_note_date
  date: 2013-11-20
  affected_law: Decreto Número 101-97, Ley Orgánica del Presupuesto
  stable_identifier: DECRETO-101-97
  text_available: yes
  replacement_text_available: yes
  evidence:
    Reform decree text explicitly states:
      "REFORMAS AL DECRETO NÚMERO 101-97 DEL CONGRESO DE LA REPÚBLICA, LEY ORGÁNICA DEL PRESUPUESTO"
    Reform decree includes article-level operations, including:
      - "ARTÍCULO 1. Se reforma el artículo 1 del Decreto Número 101-97..."
      - "ARTÍCULO 2. Se reforman las literales ... y se adicionan ..."
      - "ARTÍCULO 5. Se adiciona el artículo 7 Bis..."
      - "ARTÍCULO 7. Se reforma el artículo 12..."
      - "ARTÍCULO 24. Se reforma el artículo 38..."
  affected_articles_observed:
    - Article 1
    - Article 2
    - Article 3
    - Article 4
    - Article 7 Bis
    - Article 8
    - Article 12
    - Article 17 Bis
    - Article 17 Ter
    - Article 17 Quáter
    - Article 25
    - Article 26
    - Article 26 Bis
    - Article 27
    - Article 29 Bis
    - Article 30
    - Article 30 Bis
    - Article 30 Ter
    - Article 31
    - Article 32
    - Article 32 Bis
    - Article 33 Bis
    - Article 33 Ter
    - Article 38
    - Article 41
    - Article 42
    - Article 42 Bis
    - Article 45 Bis
    - Article 49
    - Article 50
    - Article 52
    - Article 53
    - Article 53 Bis
    - Article 55 Bis
    - Article 57 Bis
    - Article 61
    - Article 61 Bis
    - Article 65
    - Article 66
  notes:
    Decreto 13-2013 provides enough text to reconstruct at least one historical version
    of Decreto 101-97. The next parser task is to extract reform operations and
    replacement article bodies.

Reform-note frequency from consolidated base text:
  - Decreto Número 13-2013: 44 occurrences
  - Decreto Número 71-98: 6 occurrences
  - Decreto Número 9-2014: 3 occurrences
  - DECRETO NÚMERO 101-97: 1 occurrence

Conclusion:
  historical_versions_available: partial_but_actionable
  strategy: reform-note extraction from consolidated text plus reform-decree reconstruction
  gate_status: preliminary_pass
  blocker:
    Full Legalize historical reconstruction still requires determining original publication
    dates and extracting article-level replacement text robustly.
  next_action:
    Build a reform operation extractor for Decreto 13-2013.
    Extract operation type, affected article, replacement body, and reform date.
    Compare extracted replacement bodies against the consolidated sample-budget-law text.


Operation extractor result:
  extracted_operation_chunks: TBD
  target_missing_count: TBD
  preliminary_quality: usable_for_spike

Operation extractor result:
  script: scripts/extract_reform_operations.py
  input: tmp/extracted/gt/reform-decree-13-2013.txt
  output: tmp/extracted/gt/reform-operations-13-2013.txt
  extracted_operation_chunks: 47
  missing_target_count: 2
  preliminary_quality: usable_for_spike

Observed examples:
  - Decreto article 1 reforms target article 1.
  - Decreto article 5 adds target article 7 Bis.
  - Decreto article 8 adds target article 17 Bis.
  - Decreto article 9 adds target article 17 Ter.
  - Decreto article 10 adds target article 17 Quáter.
  - Decreto article 13 adds target article 26 Bis.
  - Decreto article 15 adds target article 29 Bis.
  - Decreto article 17 adds target article 30 Bis.

Updated conclusion:
  The Guatemala spike preliminarily passes for a reconstruction-based strategy.
  There is no confirmed Spain-style embedded historical API, but Decreto 13-2013
  provides article-level operations and replacement text sufficient to reconstruct
  at least one historical reform commit for Decreto 101-97.

Replacement body extractor result:
  script: scripts/extract_replacement_bodies.py
  input: tmp/extracted/gt/reform-decree-13-2013.txt
  output: tmp/extracted/gt/replacement-bodies-13-2013.txt
  extracted_replacement_bodies: 34
  operation_chunks_available: 47
  preliminary_quality: viable_for_reconstruction_spike

Observed replacement examples:
  - Decreto article 1 replacement body starts with "Artículo 1. Objeto..."
  - Decreto article 4 replacement body starts with "Artículo 4. Rendición de Cuentas..."
  - Decreto article 5 replacement body starts with "Artículo 7 Bis. Proceso Presupuestario..."
  - Decreto article 6 replacement body replaces paragraphs of article 8.
  - Decreto article 7 replacement body starts with "Artículo 12. Presupuestos de Egresos..."

Known extraction issues:
  - Some page artifacts still leak into replacement bodies, e.g. DCA page headers and page numbers.
  - Some operations affect only literals or paragraphs, not whole articles.
  - 13 operation chunks did not produce replacement bodies with the current heuristic.
  - OCR/PDF extraction artifacts remain, e.g. unusual characters, broken words, or page remnants.

Updated gate conclusion:
  The version-history spike is strong enough to justify building a Guatemala parser
  with a reconstruction-based historical strategy. The spike does not yet prove
  full automated historical fidelity, but it proves that at least one reform decree
  provides article-level operations and extractable replacement text for Decreto 101-97.
